things.name: House of Waterford Crystal
things.description: Flagship factory and showroom of the world's most famous crystal brand — watch master craftspeople cut, engrave and blow Waterford Crystal

things.name: Reginald's Tower (Viking Museum)
things.description: Ireland's oldest civic building (c. 1003) — the iconic Viking tower at the heart of Ireland's oldest city, now an excellent museum

things.name: Medieval Mile Museum
things.description: Outstanding museum in a 13th-century church tracing 1,000 years of Waterford city life — Ireland's Museum of the Year

things.name: Bishop's Palace Museum
things.description: Magnificent 18th-century palace housing the definitive collection of 18th and 19th-century Irish decorative arts

things.name: Waterford Greenway (Walking & Cycling)
things.description: 46km off-road greenway along a former railway line from Waterford city to Dungarvan — Ireland's longest off-road cycling trail

things.name: Tramore Beach & Amusements
things.description: Waterford's family beach resort — 5km of sandy beach backed by dunes, amusement parks and the iconic Metal Man lighthouse pillars

things.name: Rock of Cashel (Day Trip)
things.description: Dramatic limestone outcrop crowned by medieval cathedral, round tower and Cormac's Chapel — one of Ireland's most iconic sites

things.name: Viking Triangle Walking Tour
things.description: Self-guided or escorted tour of Ireland's oldest city — three museums, Viking walls, medieval lanes and 1,000 years of history in a compact area

things.name: Kilkenny (Day Trip)
things.description: Ireland's Medieval Capital — Kilkenny Castle, St Canice's Cathedral, the Medieval Mile Museum and a world-class craft heritage

things.name: Dunmore East Fishing Village
things.description: Picturesque thatched fishing village at the mouth of Waterford Harbour — dramatic cliffs, a working harbour and excellent seafood
